name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the margarine, oil, and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs, vanilla, and sour milk (or buttermilk). Mix well.
3. Sift dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda) into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture, alternating with zucchini. Beat well after each addition.
5. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9 inch pan and sprinkle with chocolate chips.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Let cool slightly before frosting.
Cream Cheese Frosting:
1. Cream together softened cream cheese, butter until smooth.
2. Beat in vanilla and a pinch of salt.
3. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating to desired consistency.
4. Frost cake once cooled.
